description: Construct a triangle from two angles and the included side between them (Angle-Side-Angle). The third angle is computed as 180 - angleA - angleB. Vertex A is at the base point (or origin if omitted).
utility: Create triangle from two angles and the included side between them

arguments.name: angleA
arguments.description: Angle at vertex A in degrees. Must be positive.

arguments.name: c
arguments.description: Length of side from A to B (the included side). Must be positive.

arguments.name: angleB
arguments.description: Angle at vertex B in degrees. angleA + angleB must be less than 180.

arguments.name: basePoint
arguments.description: Position for vertex A (defaults to origin). Must be a point variable or point(G, x, y).

arguments.name: angle
arguments.description: Rotation angle in degrees for the entire triangle around vertex A

alternates.description: Triangle at origin with two angles and included side
Isosceles triangle with equal base angles

examples.scenario: ASA triangle for sine rule demonstration

examples.expression: line_c = line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1), type(segment), c(blue))
